critical.issue: Function name shadowing: 'handleCreateUser' shadows the imported 'createUser' from userService, causing recursive call confusion and potential stack overflow
critical.fix: Rename the local function to avoid shadowing: 'handleCreateUserLocal' or use different import alias: 'import { createUser as createUserApi }'

critical.issue: Function name shadowing: 'handleUpdateUser' shadows the imported 'updateUser' from userService
critical.fix: Rename the local function to avoid shadowing: 'handleUpdateUserLocal' or use different import alias

critical.issue: Function name shadowing: 'handleDeleteUser' shadows the imported 'deleteUser' from userService
critical.fix: Rename the local function to avoid shadowing: 'handleDeleteUserLocal' or use different import alias

critical.issue: Dangerous type assertion on user.role.toUpperCase() - assumes the role will always be valid uppercase without runtime validation
critical.fix: Create a type guard function or use a helper: 'const safeRole = (user.role as UserRole).toUpperCase() as RoleType'

critical.issue: Dangerous type assertion on user.role.toUpperCase() - same issue as UserCard
critical.fix: Use a type-safe helper function to convert UserRole to RoleType

major.issue: Missing error feedback to user - error is logged but user sees no indication of failure
major.fix: Add error state and display error message to user: 'setError(error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Failed to add user')'

major.issue: Missing error feedback to user - error is logged but user sees no indication of failure
major.fix: Add error state and display error message to user in the modal

major.issue: Missing focus trap implementation - modal menu opens but focus is not trapped inside, violating WCAG 2.1 AA
major.code: export const UserActionsMenu: FC<UserActionsMenuProps> = ({ onEdit, onDelete }) => {
major.fix: Implement focus trap using refs and useEffect to cycle focus within menu when open

major.issue: Pagination 'Prev' button uses bg-surface instead of white background as specified in PNG audit
major.code:
<button
  onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage - 1)}
  disabled={currentPage === 1}
  aria-label="Previous page"
  className="px-4 py-2 bg-surface text-on-surface rounded-lg
major.fix: Change to 'bg-white' for Prev button as per PNG specification: 'Pagination: Prev white, Next primary'

major.issue: Missing try/catch around searchUsers call in useEffect - async operation without error boundary
major.code:
const results = await searchUsers(filter.search, userFilter);
setFilteredUsers(results);
major.fix: Already has try/catch but error handling could be improved with user feedback

major.issue: Missing aria-label on 'Add User' button - has text content but should still have aria-label for screen readers
major.code:
<button
  onClick={() => setIsAddOpen(true)}
  className="px-6 py-3 bg-primary text-on-primary rounded-xl font-medium
major.fix: Add aria-label: 'Add new user to directory'

minor.issue: Component uses motion from framer-motion for a simple badge - may be over-engineering for static content
minor.fix: Consider using plain span without animation for better performance, or keep if animation adds value

minor.issue: Component exceeds 100 lines when including all imports and JSX - should be considered for decomposition
minor.code: export const UserCard: FC<UserCardProps> = ({ user, onEdit, onDelete }) => {
minor.fix: Extract avatar initials logic to separate utility function

minor.issue: Missing focus trap implementation - dialog opens but focus management is not implemented
minor.fix: Add focus trap to keep focus within dialog while open

minor.issue: Return statement creates new object reference on every render - could cause unnecessary re-renders in child components
minor.fix: Use useMemo to memoize the return object

minor.issue: Component is large (200+ lines) - should be decomposed into smaller sub-components
minor.fix: Extract Filters, Table, Pagination into separate components

ecarts.actual: Uses bg-[#ffdbce] and text-[#9d431b] - CORRECT but hardcoded instead of using Tailwind tokens

ecarts.expected: White background as per PNG audit specification
Lexend for headlines, Work Sans for body (per DESIGN_SYSTEM.md)
ecarts.actual: Uses font-headline (Lexend) correctly but some elements use generic 'font-bold' without font-body

ecarts.expected: 5 columns: FULL NAME, EMAIL, ROLE, STATUS, ACTIONS

ecarts.actual: Correctly implements all 3 statuses with correct emojis - COMPLIANT
